text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ever since she debuted, she's racked up plenty of
victories on the Sprint and Mile tour!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Lately, this spirited miler has made remarkable
strides in her growth! And here she is! Taiki
Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, y'all! I've got a war declaration to
make!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna take down Hishi Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Murmur...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've kept a keen eye on all of her races till now!
She's one big, powerful, happy gal!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I mean, she's kinda like me in a way, but she's got
a power all her own.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If we run together, we're bound to set the track
on fire!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I've trained tons to get a chance to run next to Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna fight with all I got and take the victory
for myself today!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! How's this going to turn out?! Taiki
Shuttle's a pretty big Umamusume too!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Today's race is going to be one for the history
books for sure!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! I had no idea Taiki felt that way.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Gosh, I feel so... So...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Yasuda Kinen is a big event. Being directly
challenged like that might have triggered some
nerves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, it's my job to keep her calm, so I
clear my throat from my seat in the stands.
choice_data_list: It's all right! Take a deep—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm sooo excited! This race is gonna be fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, sorry Trainer! Were you saying
something?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh? Was I hearing things?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oops! I've got to get going! See you later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but think how truly astonishing and
strong Hishi Akebono is as she heads toward the
Yasuda Kinen with poised, steady steps.
